title: D3 FanMod
description: This fan mod for Minecraft recreates some hardcore survival mechanics of Dedsafio 3. It adds unique commands, activatable mechanics, and progression elements from the series, giving players an experience that captures a bit of the essence of Dedsafio 3.
body:
Dive into a true hardcore experience designed for hardcore and difficulty-loving Minecraft players, with this fan-made mod, crafted by fans for fans who crave challenge and intensity! Bringing thrilling mechanics, powerful items, and relentless enemies, this mod turns up the survival stakes, allowing you to customize the ultimate adventure.

List of commands that can be activated and deactivated and their functions for the player's preference:

/sun: Activates the sunburn mechanic, Feel the wrath of the sun! where exposure to sunlight causes radiation effects. Players must rely on sunscreen to survive, but remember, you’ll need help to apply it!
/zombification: Beware the ticking clock! A permanent zombie effect will challenge your endurance with a two-minute countdown when activated and only crafted pills can reset the timer. Hold onto your totem for emergencies ;)
/repair: Armor repairs at your command! Perfect for rewarding yourself or others during epic battles or special events.
/lava: Beware the purifying lava! This feature instantly removes fire resistance in lava, keeping you on your toes in fiery situations.
New Items:
Healing Infernal Sword: A rare blade that heals its wielder by chance in combat, your lifeline when things get dire.
Phantom Sword: A mystical weapon, your only defense against the fearsome Red Ghost
New Foe:
The Red Ghost: A spectral menace that stalks you mercilessly, slowing your escape with every hit. Only the Phantom Sword can match its ethereal strength.
Portable Storage at Your Side:

Inspired by shulker boxes, our 16 new shulker bags let you carry essentials on the go, keeping you prepared for anything.





From custom mechanics to unique items, every addition is made with heart for the hardcore fans who dare to survive it all. Embrace the challenge, and make every moment in your world legendary!
